what_changed: Centralized engine-adapter non-negative integer validation for estimated GPU byte fields.
Made direct EngineKVInjectionPlan construction reject boolean, float, string, and negative estimated_gpu_bytes values.
Made direct EngineKVReservationAction construction reject boolean, float, string, and negative estimated_gpu_bytes values.
Added regression coverage for the direct dataclass construction paths.
why: Serving-engine adapters should reject malformed GPU byte budgets before they reach reservation or scheduling logic, and direct dataclass construction should use the same validation semantics as serialized handoff records.
